---
title: "mrtklib-quickstart (English)"
lang: en
---

<!--
  Participant-facing single PDF (English). Aggregates every en/*.qmd chapter.
  The leading `_` excludes it from the website (HTML) build.
  Render the PDF explicitly (override the title so child front matter does not win):

    quarto render en/_manual.qmd --to pdf -M "title=mrtklib-quickstart (English)"

  See docs/build-pdf.sh to build both languages at once.
  Chapter headings (#) are declared here (an include does not turn a child's
  title into a body heading). Keep this file inside en/ so the child image
  paths (../assets) resolve correctly.
-->

# Overview

{{< include 00-overview.qmd >}}

# Concepts

{{< include 10-concepts.qmd >}}

# Install (Windows)

{{< include 20-install-windows.qmd >}}

# Install (macOS)

{{< include 21-install-macos.qmd >}}

# Install (Linux)

{{< include 22-install-linux.qmd >}}

# Receiver Setup (Windows, Linux)

{{< include 30-setup-receiver-windows-linux.qmd >}}

# Receiver Setup (macOS)

{{< include 31-setup-receiver-macos.qmd >}}

# Run (Windows)

{{< include 40-run-windows.qmd >}}

# Run (macOS)

{{< include 41-run-macos.qmd >}}

# Run (Linux)

{{< include 42-run-linux.qmd >}}

# Using the UI

{{< include 50-using-ui.qmd >}}

# Troubleshooting

{{< include 90-troubleshooting.qmd >}}
